privileged_info_summary: The task relies on dynamically generated files, including a synthetic museum logo created via ImageMagick and 5-second video clips extracted from public Blender Foundation sample videos. The verified parameters for the transcoded videos are 1920x1080 resolution, h264 video codec, and aac audio codec. The expected playlist path is explicitly '/home/ga/Videos/kiosk_ready/ocean_loop.xspf', the bash script path is '/home/ga/Desktop/start_kiosk.sh', and the required logo path is '/home/ga/Pictures/museum_logo.png'. All metadata claims exactly match the task instructions, export script paths, and verifier logic constraints.
